title: habenella quadrata
intro: Habenella quadrata is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Square-stemmed Habenella, which belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The medicinal properties of Habenella quadrata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Habenella quadrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
